summary: Iteration 19: Complete testing of Guidance Briefing Service and Frontend Card. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). All 9 frontend UI elements verified working correctly. The briefing card displays LLM-generated narrative, quick stats, and expandable details with critical filings, insider activity, AGMs, and board meetings.
passed_tests: GET /api/guidance/briefing caching - second call returns same generated_at (cached)
POST /api/guidance/briefing/refresh - returns fresh data with new generated_at
Frontend: Quick stats (critical, insider, AGM, board counts) all visible
seed_data_creation: None - using existing guidance data (2,488 announcements from 663 stocks)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 verified the Guidance Briefing Service feature. Key findings: (1) GET /api/guidance/briefing returns cached briefing (6h cache) with narrative, critical_filings, insider_activity, upcoming_agms, board_meetings, top_active_stocks, generated_at. (2) POST /api/guidance/briefing/refresh force-regenerates briefing with new timestamp. (3) LLM narrative generation uses GPT-4.1 via Emergent LLM key - first call may take 15-30s. (4) Frontend GuidanceBriefingCard component on MarketOverview.js displays all data correctly with proper data-testid attributes. (5) Expand/collapse, refresh, and navigation to /guidance all work correctly.
